metadata.purpose: Source credibility assessment for all HYROX training plan knowledge

youtube_channels.credentials: 3-time HYROX Elite 15 World Championship qualifier, professional HYROX coach, runs RMR Training program
youtube_channels.key_contribution: Training plan construction methodology, periodization, threshold training, pacing strategy

youtube_channels.credentials: PhD in Exercise Physiology, coached Ironman world champions, personal HYROX time 58:57, Endure IQ founder
youtube_channels.key_contribution: Dose-response relationships, aerobic development, W Prime concept, compromised running

youtube_channels.credentials: Exercise Physiologist (PhD), runs controlled training studies, publishes research
youtube_channels.key_contribution: Concurrent training interference, strength programming for HYROX, block periodization

youtube_channels.credentials: Hybrid athlete, 1M+ YouTube subscribers, completed multiple HYROX races, ultramarathon runner
youtube_channels.content_quality: Training logs, personal experience, high production value
youtube_channels.key_contribution: High-volume concurrent training example, auto-regulation, hybrid athlete perspective

youtube_channels.credentials: Former HYROX World Record holder, professional fitness racer, multiple HYROX world championship podiums
youtube_channels.content_quality: Practical tips, race experience, training philosophy
youtube_channels.key_contribution: Compromised running importance, race strategy, world-class training insights

youtube_channels.credentials: Best-selling endurance training author (80/20 Running, The Endurance Diet), certified coach
youtube_channels.key_contribution: Polarized training model applied to HYROX, intensity distribution

youtube_channels.credentials: Community channel focused on HYROX preparation
youtube_channels.key_contribution: Beginner pacing, general HYROX preparation approach
Additional perspectives on training errors and Zone 3 debate

academic_papers.title: Acute physiological responses and performance determinants in Hyrox
academic_papers.authors: Brandt T, Ebel C, Lebahn C, Schmidt A
academic_papers.key_contribution: First peer-reviewed HYROX study. VO2max as strongest predictor. Running dominance confirmed.

academic_papers.title: Predicting HYROX Performance in Elite Athletes: Station Contributions and Training Implications
academic_papers.key_contribution: Large-scale performance analysis. Running stages 5-8 as largest performance contributors.

academic_papers.title: Concurrent Training: A Meta-Analysis
academic_papers.journal: Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
academic_papers.key_contribution: Interference effect quantification. Running causes more interference than cycling.

academic_papers.title: HYROX Sports Science Report 2025
academic_papers.key_contribution: VO2max confirmed as #1 predictor in largest HYROX study to date

web_sources.title: Improving The Aerobic System For HYROX Case Study
web_sources.author: Triage Method (professional HYROX coach)
web_sources.key_contribution: Diagnostic approach to aerobic limitations, 'Strong But Fading' archetype

web_sources.title: The Science of HYROX Performance: A Complete Training and Nutrition Protocol
web_sources.key_contribution: Complete 16-week periodization template, weekly structure, nutrition protocol

web_sources.title: HYROX Weights Overview
web_sources.key_contribution: Official race weights for all divisions verified
